checks.name: schema_completeness
checks.detail: All required payload fields present and substantive

checks.name: flow_integrity
checks.detail: 3 flows: flow_inbound_sms (13 nodes/13 edges), flow_opt_out (10 nodes/11 edges), flow_error_recovery (11 nodes/11 edges). All well-connected with error handling nodes.

checks.name: trigger_validity
checks.detail: 1 webhook trigger: POST /twilio/inbound-sms with content_type application/x-www-form-urlencoded. Valid webhook config.

checks.name: adoption_question_fitness
checks.detail: 7 adoption_questions added: twilio_phone_number, airtable_base_id, support_channel, sales_channel, compliance_channel, business_hours_start, business_hours_end

checks.name: safety_scan
checks.detail: 0 critical findings. TCPA compliance explicitly handled. Opt-out processing is highest priority. PII handling considered.

dimensions.name: Prompt Completeness
dimensions.rationale: Identity 100+ words. Instructions cover 7 detailed steps: payload parsing, opt-out compliance, intent classification, Airtable logging, Slack routing, auto-reply with rate limiting, and conversation context. Tool guidance covers Twilio, Airtable, Slack APIs. 3 examples (support, opt-out, sales). Comprehensive error handling including compliance failures.

dimensions.name: Tool-Prompt Alignment
dimensions.rationale: All tools mapped to specific API calls. Twilio form-encoded POST for SMS. Airtable CRUD with filterByFormula. Slack Block Kit posting. Local files for rate limiting and fallback. No phantom tools.

dimensions.name: Trigger Coherence
dimensions.rationale: Webhook trigger for inbound SMS perfectly matches the event-driven processing pipeline. No schedule needed for real-time SMS processing.

dimensions.name: Connector Coverage
dimensions.rationale: All 3 service_flow entries fully backed by connectors with complete credential fields. Twilio includes phone_number field for SMS sending.

dimensions.name: Memory Design
dimensions.rationale: Per-phone-number conversation context via agent_memory. Rate limit tracking in local files. Airtable for persistent conversation history. Good layered approach.

dimensions.name: Error Handling
dimensions.rationale: Exceptional: Twilio 401/429/500 with backoff, Airtable 422/429 with local fallback, Slack channel_not_found with auto-join, malformed webhook handling (return 200 to prevent retries), opt-out compliance safety (send confirmation even if Airtable fails). Best-in-class.

dimensions.name: Use Case Fidelity
dimensions.rationale: All 3 flows fully covered in prompt: inbound SMS processing with classification and routing, opt-out compliance with multi-service fallback, error recovery with batch sync.

dimensions.name: Value Clarity
dimensions.rationale: Clear outcome: replaces 4 separate Twilio automation workflows. Intelligent routing, compliance enforcement, conversation context. Strong business value for SMS-heavy operations.

dimensions.name: Execution Feasibility
dimensions.rationale: Twilio, Airtable, Slack APIs are standard. Webhook endpoint setup requires Twilio console configuration. Real-time processing is well-architected with fallbacks.

dimensions.name: Differentiation
dimensions.rationale: Context-aware intent classification, conversation continuity, time-aware auto-replies, compliance-first architecture — far beyond what rigid Twilio automations can achieve.

dimensions.name: Variable Necessity
dimensions.rationale: All 7 questions target genuine config needs. Multiple Slack channels for intent routing. Business hours for time-aware replies. Phone number for SMS sending.

dimensions.name: Default Quality
dimensions.rationale: Good defaults for Slack channels, business hours. twilio_phone_number and airtable_base_id must be user-provided. User needs to fill 2 essential values.

issues: No adoption_questions existed — 7 added covering Twilio, Airtable, Slack channel routing, and business hours config
Twilio and Airtable connectors may not have builtin definitions

Included use_case_ids on channel-specific questions to scope them to relevant flows
Used select type with time options for business hours configuration
